zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners於1415年出生在英國艾可蕾托 伊斯頓時，他的父親Sir William Bourchier56歲，母親Anne of Gloucester32歲。他於1441年與Margery Berners在英國素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1461年被列為constable of windsor castle。他去世於1474年5月16日在英國賀特福爾巴內特享年59歲，埋葬在英國素瑞傑千。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners于1415年出生在英国艾可蕾托 伊斯頓时，他的父亲Sir William Bourchier56岁，母亲Anne of Gloucester32岁。他于1441年与Margery Berners在英国素瑞韋斯特 霍斯利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1461年被列为constable of windsor castle。他去世于1474年5月16日在英国賀特福爾巴內特享年59岁，埋葬在英国素瑞傑千。

nameMeanings.name: Bourchier,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: perhaps a variant of   Burcher   (  see  Bircher  ). Some of the following early bearers may alternatively belong under (2). The name has sometimes been altered to or confused with   Bouchier   and   Boucher  .

2 Norman, English: locative name of uncertain origin but it is presumably from a French place-name, perhaps Boursières in Haute-Saône. The name was early confused with other surnames and may survive in Bouchier, Bowcher, Bowser, and Boozer . The surname gave rise to a number of minor place-names in Essex: Bourchier’s alias Bouchier’s Hall in Aldham, Bourchier’s Hall in Messing; Bouchier’s Grange in Great Coggeshall, Bouchiers Chapel in Tollesbury, Boarstye Fm and Bowser’s Hall in Rivenhall (Essex), and Boose’s Green in Colne Engayne.

variants.name: Bourcier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Lucien, Armand, Emile.
French: variant of   Boursier   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.
History: The (majority of the) American bearers of the surname Bourcier are descendants of Jean Boursier dit Lavigne from France (see Boursier ).

variants.name: Bircher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Albrecht, Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ulrich.
South German and Swiss German: topographic name for someone who lived by a birch tree or in a birch wood, from Middle High German birche ‘birch’ + the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant.
English: habitational name from Birchover in Derbyshire or Bircher in Hereford, both named as from Old English birce ‘birch’ + ofer ‘ridge’.

variants.name: Bouchier
meanings: 1  English: variant of   Butcher  .
2  English: alternatively a variant of   Belcher  .
3  Norman, English: possibly a variant of   Bourchier   (2).

variants.name: Bowser
meanings: English: nickname from either from Old French beu cher ‘good company’, or from Old French beu sire ‘fair sir’ (see Belcher ), given either to a fine gentleman (perhaps ironically), or to someone who made frequent use of this term of address. Compare Bonser and Boozer .
English: variant of   Bolsover  .
Americanized form of German   Bauser  .

variants.name: Boozer
meanings: Americanized form of Swiss German   Buser  .
English (Kent): variant of   Bowser   1.

variants.name: Burcher
meanings: English: variant of   Bircher  .

variants.name: Boucher
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Gilles, Lucien, Yvon, Adrien, Jacques, Laurent, Alcide.

French: occupational name for a butcher or slaughterer, from Old French bouchier, a derivative of bouc ‘ram’. Compare Bouche 2, Bouchey , Bouchie , Boushey , Boushie , Bush 5, Busha 1, Busher , and Bushey 3.
English: variant of   Butcher  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Borger
meanings: North German (also Börger) and Dutch: variant of Burger .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from Yiddish borger ‘borrower’ or ‘lender’.
Norwegian and Swedish: habitational name for someone from a place called Borg (see   Borg  ), or a topographic name for someone living by a fortification or near a hill resembling a fortification.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners was born in 1415, in Little Easton, Essex, England, his father, Sir William Bourchier, was 56 and his mother, Anne of Gloucester, was 32. He married Margery Berners in 1441, in West Horsley, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. In 1461, his occupation is listed as constable of windsor castle. He died on 16 May 1474, in Barnet, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Chertsey, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners est né en 1415, à Little Easton, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Bourchier, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Anne of Gloucester, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margery Berners en 1441, à West Horsley, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. En 1461, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of windsor castle. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1474, à Barnet, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Chertsey, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners 1415 in Little Easton, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Bourchier 56 und seine Mutter Anne of Gloucester 32. Er hat 1441 in West Horsley, Surrey, England Margery Berners geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1461 ist sein Beruf als constable of windsor castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Mai 1474 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Barnet, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Chertsey, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners è nato il nel 1415 nel Little Easton, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir William Bourchier, aveva 56 anni e il suo madre, Anne of Gloucester, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margery Berners nel 1441, nel West Horsley, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1461, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of windsor castle. Morì il 16 maggio 1474, nel Barnet, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Chertsey, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Bernersが1415年にイギリスエセックスリットル エアストンで生まれた時，父Sir William Bourchierは56歳，母Anne of Gloucesterは32歳であった。1441年にイギリススリーウエスト ホールスリーでMargery Bernersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1461年，職業はconstable of windsor castleと記録されている。彼は1474年5月16日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバーネットで59歳で死去し，イギリススリーチェルトセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners(이)가 1415년 영국 에세스 리틀 이스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Bourchier(은)는 56세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne of Gloucester(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1441년 영국 수리 웨스트 호르슬리에서 Margery Berners(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1461년, 그의 직업은 constable of windsor castle이었다. 그는 1474년 5월 16일 영국 허트퍼드실르 바른에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 처츠이에 묻혔다.

pt.from 26 May 1455 to 19 August 1472: de 26 de maio de 1455 a 19 de agosto de 1472
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners nasceu em 1415, em Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Bourchier, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Anne of Gloucester, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Berners em 1441, em West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1461, sua profissão aparece como constable of windsor castle. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1474, em Barnet, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners родился в 1415 г. в местности литл эастон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Bourchier было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne of Gloucester, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Berners в 1441 г. в местности вест хаурсли, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. В 1461 году он работал по профессии constable of windsor castle. Он умер 16 мая 1474 г. в местности барнет, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности чирци, сурри, Англия.

es.from 26 May 1455 to 19 August 1472: desde 26 de mayo de 1455 hasta 19 de agosto de 1472
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Bourchier, 1st Baron Berners nació en 1415, en Little Easton, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Bourchier, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Anne of Gloucester, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margery Berners en 1441, en West Horsley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1461, su ocupación registrada era constable of windsor castle. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1474, en Barnet, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Chertsey, Surrey, Inglaterra.
